commentaries.author: Clement Of Alexandria
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh They have lied about the LORD, and said, It is not he; neither shall evil come upon us; neither shall we see sword nor famine: Accusation is the censure of wrongdoers. This mode of instruction God employs by David, when he says, “The people whom I did not know served me, and when their ears heard they obeyed me. Sons of strangers came to me, and halted from their ways. ” And by Jeremiah: “And I gave her a divorce decree, but covenant-breaking Judah did not fear. ” And again: “And the house of Israel disregarded me. The house of Judah lied to the Lord.
